findings.summary: Dashboard loader hard-checked schema_version='tls-04.v1' and phase='TLS-04', but the published artifact is 'tls-06.v1' / 'TLS-06'.
findings.consequence: Loader rejected the live artifact as invalid_schema, producing the 'Top 3 unavailable' state.

findings.summary: Top-level path artifacts/system_dependency_priority_report.json may exist while the publish step has not yet copied a freshly built TLS artifact.
findings.consequence: When publish lags the build, dashboard had no fallback to the artifacts/tls/ sibling path.

findings.summary: There was no recompute_command surfaced to the operator when the artifact was missing or invalid.
findings.consequence: Fail-closed banner became a dead end; operator had to inspect docs to find the rebuild command.
